meta.title: 16Launcher — Minecraft launcher
meta.description: 16Launcher — the best choice for playing Minecraft: a fast, modern launcher with convenient content search and safe modpack downloads.

hero.tagline: The best choice for playing Minecraft

features.title: Optimization
features.text: Maximum optimization — the launcher runs smoothly even on low-end PCs.

features.title: Content
features.text: Convenient in-launcher content search, plus easy creation and management of modpacks.

features.title: Security
features.text: The launcher is completely safe: no malware. Its source code is also open.

lines.rest: search, filters, and room for your modpacks!

settings.accentPart: Customize the look to your taste.

lines.rest: profile management, modpack creation, and configuration.

java.restPart: game settings tailored to your needs.

footer.disclaimer: 16Launcher is not an official product of Mojang or Microsoft.
